waitlist.title: Coming Soon
waitlist.subtitle: We are preparing something extraordinary. Sign up for the waitlist to be among the first to discover it.
waitlist.gdprConsent: I have read and accept the privacy policy and the processing of my personal data.
waitlist.marketingConsent: I would like to receive updates, news and special offers by email.
waitlist.successMessage: Thank you for signing up. Check your email to confirm your registration.
waitlist.verifySuccess: Email successfully verified! You are on the waitlist.
waitlist.verifyExpired: The verification link has expired. Request a new link.
waitlist.verifyAlready: This email has already been verified.
waitlist.unsubscribeSuccess: You have been successfully removed from the waitlist.
waitlist.unsubscribeAlready: This email is not on the waitlist.
waitlist.loginLink: Already have an account? Sign in
